charlatan v0.4.1.92
  • Get started

  • Articles
    • Contributing to charlatan
  • Changelog

Create fake DOIs (Digital Object Identifiers)

Source: R/doi.R
ch_doi.Rd

Create fake DOIs (Digital Object Identifiers)

ch_doi(n = 1)

Arguments

n

(integer) number of things to get, any non-negative integer

See also

DOIProvider

Examples

ch_doi()

#> [1] "10.9924/nrsv.5191858"
ch_doi(10)

#>  [1] "10.28688/20682.75561.7876" "10.62908/89634-72300-4593"
#>  [3] "10.77475/bqku.33129596"    "10.66860/fxgo.7144115"    
#>  [5] "10.57127/48424-38863-1543" "10.84782/38034-24974-7502"
#>  [7] "10.77195/tdac.7322311"     "10.29910/94711-85636-476" 
#>  [9] "10.87148/cgiy.6658809"     "10.61129/62164-25242-210" 
ch_doi(100)

#>   [1] "10.35234/51898-59190-6031" "10.90650/qwok.29544198"   
#>   [3] "10.91109/fwzi.22805341"    "10.53762/85149.68696.4707"
#>   [5] "10.65711/yows.59755164"    "10.12514/42016.11035.5021"
#>   [7] "10.18822/zmyf.92132832"    "10.91095/70137.91451.8076"
#>   [9] "10.19435/9557-21671-8641"  "10.59255/gbws.51715114"   
#>  [11] "10.52919/37132-30264-7844" "10.86924/tlps.68086271"   
#>  [13] "10.94835/yron.5259753"     "10.36718/52844-56952-6423"
#>  [15] "10.53319/97037-70395-3316" "10.25011/89497.31604.6924"
#>  [17] "10.24781/yolm.98918920"    "10.90469/zlsx.29176958"   
#>  [19] "10.13766/gcwa.93921385"    "10.16873/xaqy.91952681"   
#>  [21] "10.51439/4508.14679.7432"  "10.47271/48740.13693.8039"
#>  [23] "10.67372/97138.9253.4901"  "10.26889/lcxp.89500422"   
#>  [25] "10.86828/phmq.57986929"    "10.5864/auwk.66724306"    
#>  [27] "10.91655/30178.46969.9398" "10.37792/30288.97658.9683"
#>  [29] "10.36059/vlci.72525202"    "10.99936/4326-44584-5256" 
#>  [31] "10.50349/kwdl.41909554"    "10.28744/oqbc.63197453"   
#>  [33] "10.85019/gstl.53811347"    "10.15091/60634.36581.3786"
#>  [35] "10.67584/12011.8899.2903"  "10.16929/wqbn.96999147"   
#>  [37] "10.6607/69456-50336-4880"  "10.48335/hxgj.53532942"   
#>  [39] "10.51352/hbna.16121173"    "10.67367/46227.83632.3271"
#>  [41] "10.21441/ijsf.71756377"    "10.95110/19974-43449-3796"
#>  [43] "10.18016/lrys.13490535"    "10.73615/56399.62480.1546"
#>  [45] "10.21558/xcql.499994"      "10.47443/pnvw.5877100"    
#>  [47] "10.41262/lrwf.2335327"     "10.5253/onjz.32930722"    
#>  [49] "10.20469/dtbi.81162624"    "10.5548/elsb.42468154"    
#>  [51] "10.45900/58909.62183.7713" "10.84748/52073.30765.8591"
#>  [53] "10.58205/11505-12303-4526" "10.30713/gdps.46089674"   
#>  [55] "10.23405/yzhw.76365625"    "10.57341/clug.79588183"   
#>  [57] "10.26961/ghts.20533470"    "10.13295/30249-97784-3215"
#>  [59] "10.58321/ofps.49931188"    "10.34299/hjdk.4555640"    
#>  [61] "10.42978/55924-20074-172"  "10.38332/57479.86686.3665"
#>  [63] "10.66109/79319.51228.877"  "10.20727/shyx.45285566"   
#>  [65] "10.78525/fhut.5696284"     "10.17765/xzka.4278410"    
#>  [67] "10.84330/60275.53162.3723" "10.15523/57069.65110.588" 
#>  [69] "10.33433/cmlg.82638946"    "10.65429/qeij.8639017"    
#>  [71] "10.93202/50586-69025-3968" "10.24588/91914.634.1031"  
#>  [73] "10.99425/74289.40293.3062" "10.34215/1820-72179-413"  
#>  [75] "10.31596/78100.94306.7934" "10.31244/46079-60590-4467"
#>  [77] "10.81217/itql.41957788"    "10.2001/jndq.42770100"    
#>  [79] "10.45723/32879-23207-446"  "10.94189/69415-54893-2509"
#>  [81] "10.19326/fneg.91172452"    "10.49554/5449.29761.5178" 
#>  [83] "10.74512/30963.85414.1332" "10.35574/gzwb.50695903"   
#>  [85] "10.3508/28519-42779-4634"  "10.88239/qevg.62512829"   
#>  [87] "10.75310/ocwa.62481496"    "10.99634/hpul.60052423"   
#>  [89] "10.62742/raje.97128168"    "10.20584/72441-98273-7817"
#>  [91] "10.69405/77326.94818.4638" "10.95974/22800-83230-8380"
#>  [93] "10.38461/28928.73289.6940" "10.99626/20444-53600-1891"
#>  [95] "10.89313/horm.2710883"     "10.25257/62734-16191-7760"
#>  [97] "10.99829/17697.61217.9845" "10.52942/55594-13426-4580"
#>  [99] "10.51287/mfne.83603323"    "10.36516/rdfj.75680754"
